title: Tech specialist
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:KazLoZabrakTechSpecialist.jpg|thumb|[[Kaz Lo]], a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] Tech Specialist.]]

A '''tech specialist''' was an individual highly skilled with a wide array of talents related to technology. Tech specialists were usually expert computer users, security breachers, droid repairers, and were able to deactive the most advanced of demolitions.

During [[Darth Nihilus]]'s Jedi Purge in the aftermath of the [[Mandalorian Wars]], tech specialist [[Bao-Dur]] assisted the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] during her journeys.

==Behind the scenes==
*The Tech Specialist is a character class in the computer game ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''. It is the unique character class of Bao-Dur; no other character is known to belong to the Tech Specialist class in that game. Bao-Dur receives 6 Skill Points during a level up—7 if the player gives one more Attribute Point to him on his Intelligence.
*The Tech Specialist is a core character class from the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook]] Edition. Among other specialties, this was the only core character class that could create items that were superior in quality and granted appropriate bonuses for their use. This character class has been eliminated with the advent of the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook|Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition]] and a talent tree, along with a special feat, has been added to replace it. Interestingly, the new feat and talent tree seem to give a slight bias towards using scoundrels or nobles as tech specialists, implying that a "tech" should not be particularly combat-heavy.
*The Tech Specialist has been represented in the [[Star Wars Miniatures|Star Wars Miniature Game]] with the [[Iktotchi/Legends|Iktotchi]] Tech Specialist (Revenge of the Sith Expansion) and the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] Tech Specialist (Alliance and Empire Expansion).
